title: 2023 DPA Sentiments Data
summary: Designers report moderate sentiment across multiple dimensions. 53.9% made formal career levelling progress in the past year; 25.5% increased pay by more than 20%. Company support for career growth averaged 4.54/7. 57.1% negotiated their current compensation, and 57.1% felt fairly compensated for their role (ratings 5-7). Market rate awareness averaged 4.71/7, but only 36% agreed there are good resources to stay informed (average 3.86/7). Negotiation confidence averaged 4.51/7. Work arrangement comfort is high at 5.57/7. 67.2% work extra hours, with 16.4% working more than 5 extra hours per week. Over half are open to switching jobs when a neutral-or-better response is counted as open.
methodology: Self-reported Likert-scale sentiment questions (1-7 scale) covering career progression, compensation fairness, negotiation behaviour and confidence, market rate awareness, resource availability, work arrangement comfort, extra hours, and job search intentions.
